key_updates: README introduces BV-NEL by full method name and sediment Eh measurement purpose.
README uses Einitial and Eprelim notation consistently.
Step 1 now states that Einitial is calculated from the final 1 s of the 40 s OCP record.
Example files are limited to the mobile-side TXT record export and screenshots; intermediate OCP/i-t/fitting CSV files were removed.
OCP averaging window in the packaged source and documentation is set to final 1 s.
Communication protocol documentation now states that the customized portable electrochemical workstation was provided by Wuxi Signal Technology Co., Ltd.
notes: GitHub-ready package with self-explanatory README, workflow figure, communication protocol, V6 record-management examples, cleaned example files, and non-commercial academic research license. Instrument-provider information was added to README and docs/hardware_app_communication_protocol.md.
license: Custom Non-Commercial Academic Research License; no patent license granted; commercial use requires prior written permission.
